rss.title: EPRI launches new large load framework to reduce time to power for data centers
rss.snippet: EPRI is launching Flex MOSAIC, a framework for large electric loads, developed with 65 utilities and tech providers, to improve data center power access and grid reliability.

rss.title: Trump administration to pay French company $1B to walk away from US offshore wind leases
rss.snippet: The Trump administration will pay $1 billion to TotalEnergies to cancel two offshore wind leases in North Carolina and New York.

rss.title: Record heat, melting snow: What does it mean for California’s reservoirs?
rss.snippet: California faces a record heat wave impacting its Sierra Nevada snowpack, now at 38% of average for mid-March, complicating water storage.

github_repos.title: protontypes/open-sustainable-technology
github_repos.snippet: A directory and analysis of the open source ecosystem in the areas of climate change, sustainable energy, biodiversity and natural resources.  https://docs.getgrist.com/gSscJkc5Rb1R/OpenSustaintech

github_repos.title: pvlib/pvlib-python
github_repos.snippet: A set of documented functions for simulating the performance of photovoltaic energy systems.

arxiv_papers.title: Entire Period Transient Stability of Synchronous Generators Considering LVRT Switching of Nearby Renewable Energy Sources
arxiv_papers.snippet: In scenarios where synchronous generators (SGs) and grid-following renewable energy sources (GFLR) are co-located, existing research, which mainly focuses on the first-swing stability of SGs, often overlooks ongoing dynamic interactions between GFLRs and SGs throughout the entire rotor swing period.

arxiv_papers.title: Dominant Transient Stability of the Co-located PLL-Based Grid-Following Renewable Plant and Synchronous Condenser Systems
arxiv_papers.snippet: Deploying synchronous condensers (SynCons) near grid-following renewable energy sources (GFLRs) is an effective and increasingly adopted strategy for grid support.
